nodes.name: Grey ground thrush
nodes.summary: The grey ground thrush (Geokichla princei) is a species of bird in the family Turdidae. Distribution and habitat It is native to the Guineo-Congolian region. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References

nodes.name: Grey ground thrush
nodes.summary: Grey ground thrush（Geokichla princei）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Grey ground thrush。

nodes.name: Geokichla
nodes.summary: Geokichla（Geokichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联21种鸟类，如Pied thrush、Spotted ground thrush、Black-eared ground thrush等21种鸟类。
